strengths: Nearly 20 years of engineering experience spanning web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and low-latency distributed systems (micro-services handling millions of requests per second), comfortably exceeding the 15-year requirement

Current hands-on AI builder fluency at re:cinq: AI-agent infrastructure, MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators, and frameworks supporting agentic workflows — directly aligned with the role's AI-powered product focus

Proven entrepreneurial and thought-leadership track record: 9-year founder of GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform adopted by Green Map worldwide), plus conference talks (FOSS4G) and multi-day workshops and courses he created and delivered
concerns: No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, a stated preferred qualification
Formal titles top out at Staff/Senior engineer; no explicit director-level or org-wide strategic-advisory scope on record
Dedicated AI experience is recent (2025–present) and tooling-centric rather than a long tenure shipping large-scale AI products or ML platforms

key_factors.factor: Hands-on AI-agent and MCP infrastructure experience
Breadth and depth of ~20 years across software, embedded, and cloud infrastructure
Founder experience and public technical evangelism

response.justification: Bogdan Szabo presents a compelling profile for a director-level IC focused on AI strategy: he clears the 15-year experience bar with unusual breadth — from embedded and hardware (robotic arms, wave field synthesis) through high-throughput low-latency backends to modern cloud stacks (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) — and is currently building exactly the kind of AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling the role targets. His decade running GISCollective demonstrates the entrepreneurial, build-from-zero instinct the preferred qualifications call for, and his sustained record of workshops, courses, and conference talks maps directly onto the mandate to advise partners and inspire others through difficult, disruptive work. The evidence supports advancing him as a strong builder-strategist candidate.
